item.title: A Smarter Way to Repot Plants
item.description: Learn a simple planting trick that uses a smaller pot to make transferring plants into larger containers quicker and easier.

media:content.media:description: Learn a simple planting trick that uses a smaller pot to make transferring plants into larger containers quicker and easier.

item.title: Never Plug a Surge Protector Into Another One
item.description: Learn why plugging one surge protector into another is generally not recommended and what to do instead for safer power distribution.

media:content.media:title: Never Plug a Surge Protector Into Another One
media:content.media:description: Learn why plugging one surge protector into another is generally not recommended and what to do instead for safer power distribution.

item.title: Why Wet Fingers Make Eggs Easier to Pick Up
item.description: Discover why slightly wet fingertips can make it easier to grip and pick up eggs without squeezing too hard.

media:content.media:description: Discover why slightly wet fingertips can make it easier to grip and pick up eggs without squeezing too hard.

item.title: The Taco Trick I Wish I Knew Sooner

item.title: Can Rice Clean a Coffee Grinder?
item.description: Discover a popular coffee grinder maintenance tip using rice and learn what it can and can't do for your grinder.

item.title: The Secret Behind Thumbholes in Sleeves
item.description: Discover why some shirts and jackets have thumbholes in the sleeves and how they can improve comfort, warmth, and fit during everyday wear or exercise.

item.title: A Faster Way to Peel Garlic
item.description: Learn how briefly microwaving garlic can help loosen the skin, making it quicker and easier to peel before cooking.

media:content.media:title: A Faster Way to Peel Garlic
media:content.media:description: Learn how briefly microwaving garlic can help loosen the skin, making it quicker and easier to peel before cooking.
